basic_details.job_title: CSIR IGIB Multi-Tasking Staff Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: CSIR - Institute of Genomics & Integrative Biology (CSIR-IGIB)
basic_details.short_information: CSIR-Institute of Genomics & Integrative Biology (CSIR-IGIB), Delhi has released a recruitment notification for the post of Multi-Tasking Staff (MTS) under Advertisement No. 02/2026. Eligible candidates can apply online through the official website of CSIR-IGIB.

important_dates.raw: Starting Date for Apply Online: 27-07-2026 (10:00 AM) Last Date for Apply Online: 26-08-2026 (05:00 PM)

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 25 Years Age relaxation will be applicable as per Government rules.

salary_details.details: Pay Scale: Pay Matrix Level-01 Basic Pay: Rs. 18,000 - 56,900/- Total Emoluments: Approximately Rs. 36,360/- including applicable allowances.

how_to_apply: Click on the online application link.
Fill out the application form correctly.
Submit the application form before the last date.
Take a printout of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Important Dates
content_sections.text: Starting Date for Apply Online: 27-07-2026 (10:00 AM) Last Date for Apply Online: 26-08-2026 (05:00 PM)

content_sections.heading: CSIR IGIB MTS Vacancy 2026 - Post Details
content_sections.text: CSIR-IGIB has announced vacancies for the Multi-Tasking Staff (MTS) post. The category-wise vacancy details are given below:

content_sections.heading: Who Can Apply for CSIR IGIB MTS Recruitment 2026?
content_sections.text: Candidates who fulfil the required educational qualification and age criteria can apply for the CSIR IGIB MTS Recruitment 2026. Educational Qualification: Candidates must have passed 10th Class (Matriculation) from a recognised board.

content_sections.heading: CSIR IGIB MTS Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 25 Years Age relaxation will be applicable as per Government rules.

content_sections.heading: CSIR IGIB MTS Recruitment 2026 - Salary
content_sections.text: Pay Scale: Pay Matrix Level-01 Basic Pay: Rs. 18,000 - 56,900/- Total Emoluments: Approximately Rs. 36,360/- including applicable allowances.

content_sections.heading: CSIR IGIB MTS Recruitment 2026 Selection Process
How to Apply for CSIR IGIB MTS Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Visit the official CSIR-IGIB website. Open the recruitment section. Read the official notification carefully. Click on the online application link. Complete registration with required details. Fill out the application form correctly. Upload required documents. Submit the application form before the last date. Take a printout of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. How many vacancies are available in CSIR IGIB MTS Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: CSIR IGIB has announced 2 vacancies for the Multi-Tasking Staff (MTS) post.

faq.question: Q2. What is the qualification required for CSIR IGIB MTS Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must have passed 10th Class (Matriculation) from a recognised board.

faq.question: Q3. What is the last date to apply for CSIR IGIB MTS Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application is 26 August 2026.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary of CSIR IGIB MTS posts?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive Pay Matrix Level-01 salary of Rs. 18,000 - 56,900/-.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for CSIR IGIB MTS Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates can apply online through the official CSIR-IGIB website.
